steps.title: Identify the claimed influence
steps.content: The historian's claim is specifically about audience-mediated slapstick comedy. The best quotation must show both exaggerated physical humor and audience reactions shaping the performance.

steps.title: Find both features
steps.content: The quotation about actos includes exaggerated physical humor and says cheers or boos from agricultural workers promoted improvisation. A lacks audience mediation, B focuses on social critique, and C names satire and rasquache instead. The answer is D.
